flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Massachusetts Global rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.0k → $15.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Massachusetts Global fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Massachusetts Global rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (2.1k → 2.3k).
